## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Task / chore (`chore:` or `docs:`)
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Related issues

<!-- Required when fixing or implementing tracked work -->

Fixes GyroERP/backend#<!-- issue number -->

<!-- Examples: Fixes GyroERP/backend#123 · Closes GyroERP/frontend#45 -->

## Project board

- [ ] Issue is on [GyroERP Development](https://github.com/orgs/GyroERP/projects/2)
- [ ] Card moved to **In review** (or will be after PR opens)

See the full workflow: [PROJECT.md](https://github.com/GyroERP/.github/blob/main/PROJECT.md)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My changes follow the GyroERP Community License terms
- [ ] I have not committed secrets (`.env`, keys, credentials)
- [ ] Database migrations are included (if applicable)
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest` / `python manage.py test`)
- [ ] `python manage.py check` passes
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
